title: Anger at funeral of Lebanese journalist killed by Israeli army: 'Amal gave voice to the south and the sacrifices endured by this region'

title: Claude Bessy, star dancer and director of the Paris Opéra's dance school, dies at 93
subhead: Born into a family of artists in 1932, Claude Bessy, who devoted her life to dance and trained several generations of dancers, died in Paris on Thursday, April 23, at the age of 93.

title: How tulips took over the world
subhead: Born in Central Asia, these bulb plants – whose name likely comes from their turban-like shape – have a long evolutionary history that is now better understood.

title: From 'The Sims' to 'The Last of Us': How video games allow gamers to explore their sexuality

title: In Lebanon, Israel establishes an uninhabited buffer zone behind a 'yellow line'
